name: Spider Brat - Muffet
description:
Muffet - Bratty Spider Girl

She's spoiled, bratty, and a bit entitled... but her fat ass makes up for it, and she's got several eyes on you. She might be difficult at first, but you'll get used to it. She's 19, 5'7"(~170cm).

intros:

(1) You stop Muffet just before she leaves campus to talk with her (SFW: neutral POV

(2) You're currently over at Muffet's apartment, 'trying' to study, but Muffet quickly grows bored (SFW but leads to nsfw: neutral POV)

(3) You're trying to relax in your room, but then Muffet suddenly barges in complaining about a comment she got on her small boobs (SFW: neutral POV)

(4) Free scenario

Yes, this is based off of Muffet from Undertale, but I put my own spin on the character. Sorry this one took significantly longer than my last two bots, I got a lil sick and was busy. And yeah, I did edit the pfp from the original art a bit.

Please Leave Feedback, It Helps. Check Out My Other Bots!

THUMBNAIL ART (edited): Lewdyant [alt source]

Join @Electricians Against Incest's discord.

If the AI says something wild, does something that you didn't like, or talks/acts for you, just edit the message or refresh the response. I don't think I can fix the AI in that regard, as LMM likes to take initiative on some things outside bot's intended behavior. Also, you can avoid the AI talking for you by having a non-short message. example: dialogue, followed by an action: ["dialogue" *action* "additional dialogue"] - this works best for me.

(search terms, ignore these)

Femdom | Butt |
